title: Beef and Spicy Tacos
description: A flavorful and spicy Mexican dish, perfect for tacos Tuesday. This recipe is a fusion of traditional Mexican flavors with a spicy twist.

ingredients.name: Tortillas
ingredients.notes: Corn tortillas recommended for authentic flavor

ingredients.name: Diced Onions
ingredients.notes: Red or yellow onion works well

ingredients.name: Sliced Jalapeños
ingredients.notes: Adjust to taste for level of heat

instructions: 1. In a large skillet, heat 1 tablespoon of oil over medium-high heat.
2. Add the ground beef and cook until browned, breaking it up into small pieces as it cooks.
3. Add the spicy taco seasoning and stir to combine.
4. Reduce heat to low and simmer for 5 minutes.
5. Warm the tortillas by wrapping them in a damp paper towel and microwaving for 20-30 seconds.
6. Assemble the tacos by spooning the beef mixture onto a tortilla, followed by diced onions, tomatoes, and a sprinkle of cheese.
7. Top with sliced jalapeños and serve immediately.
